# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

cluster:
  name: production_cluster
  dashboard_enabled: false

node:
  name: es-node-1
  data:
    - /mnt/data1
    - /mnt/data2
  ingest:
    user: elasticsearch
  network.host: [_local_, _site_]
  network.tcp.keepalive_idletime: 3000m
  network.tcp.keepalive_interval: 10

http:
  xpack:
    security:
      authc:
        realms:
          file:
            types:
              internal:
                name: 'Elasticsearch Built-In'
                order: 0
      api:
        allow_cross_origin: true
        csp:
          policy:
            style-src: "'self'"
            script-src: "'self'"

xpack:
  search:
    roles:
      - "*"
  monitoring:
    enabled: false
  reporting:
    enabled: false

discovery:
  zen.minimum_master_nodes: 2
  hosts: ["host1", "host2"]
  ping_timeout: 10s
  ping_interval: 5s
  master_node_timeout: 50s
  num_masters: 3
